description: The ModelImportDialog component is better explained at Importing.

fields._scale: The scale of the model being imported.
fields._autoScale: Whether to use auto scale to humanoid height
fields._material: What kind of material to import the materials for the model as.
fields._preferSpecular: Whether the importer should prefer to use specular materials.
fields._rig: Whether the model has a rig or not.
fields._setupIK: Whether IK should be set up.
fields._debugRig: Whether to debug the rig bones after import.
fields._colliders: Whether to add auto generated colliders.
fields._snappable: Whether to import the model as separate snappable pieces
fields._timelapse: Whether to import animations as timelapses
fields._externalTextures: Whether to look for external textures when importing
fields._grabbable: Whether to import the model as grabbable
fields._scalable: Whether to import the model as scalable.
fields._importAtOrigin: Whether to import the model centered at the world origin
fields._forceTpose: Whether to enforce a t-pose on an IK model when importing
fields._assetsOnObject: Whether to place the asset components on the avatar itself under a list of slots, or place them under the world assets and have them be optimized automatically.
fields._asPointCloud: Whether to import as a point cloud.
fields._importImagesByName: Whether to import images by name.
fields._importImageAlignment: Which axis import the image objects along.
fields._calculateNormals: Whether to calculate new normals on import.
fields._calculateTangents: Whether to calculate new tangents on import.
fields._calculateTextureAlpha: Whether to calculate new texture alpha/transparency on import.
fields._importVertexColors: Whether to import vertex color data for the model.
fields._importAlbedoColor: Whether to import material solid albedo color data on import
fields._importEmissive: Whether to import material solid emissive color data on import.
fields._importBones: Whether to import model rig bones on import.
fields._importLights: Whether to import model light objects on import.
fields._makeDualSided: Whether to import the model as dual sided geometry.
fields._makeFlatShaded: Whether to import the model geometry as flat shaded rather than smooth shaded.
fields._deduplicateInstances: Whether to deduplicate duplicate data on the mesh like cubes or models in the same place and size.
fields._optimizeModel: Whether to do some small optimizations to the model or not.
fields._splitSubmeshes: Whether to split the model by material or not.
fields._generateRandomColors: Whether to generate random colors per material for identification or not.
fields._spawnMaterialOrbs: Whether to spawn material orb objects per material for easy access.
fields._maxTextureSize: The max texture size to restrict textures to on the model during import.
fields._textureConversion: What kind of texture format to convert imported textures to.
fields._forcePointFiltering: Whether to force point filtering on textures (Pixel art)
fields._forceNoMipMaps: Whether to disable texture resolution reduction by distance optimization.
fields._forceUncompressed: Whether to disable compression on assets and textures or not.
fields.ForceAsPointCloud: Whether to enforce importing the model as a point cloud or not.
fields.PotentialGaussianSplat: Whether to interpret the data as a gaussian splat.
fields._flipY: Whether to flip the gaussian splat on the Y axis.
fields._encodeSPZ: Whether the gaussian splat is an SPZ format.

methods.OpenRoot: Called when the root menu needs generating.
methods.Preset_3DModel: Called when the 3d model preset button is touched.
methods.Preset_VertexColorModel: Called when the vertex color model preset button is touched.
methods.Menu3DModel: called when the 3d model menu needs generating.
methods.MenuFinishImport: Is called when the finish import menu needs generating.
methods.OpenAdvancedSettings: Called when the advanced settings button is touched.
methods.Preset_Regular3DModel: Called when the regular model preset button is touched.
methods.Preset_Separable3DModel: Called when the separate snappable pieces preset button is touched.
methods.Preset_3DScan: Called when the 3d scan preset button is touched.
methods.Preset_CADModel: Called when the CAD preset button is touched.
methods.Preset_PointCloud: Called when the point cloud preset button is touched.
methods.Preset_GaussianSplat: Called when the gaussian splat preset button is touched.
methods.MenuGaussianSplatVertical: Called when the vertical gaussian splat menu needs generating
methods.MenuGaussianSplatEncoding: called when the gaussian splat encoding menu needs generating.
methods.MenuScale: called when the scaling menu needs generating.
methods.ScaleAuto: Called when the Scale auto button is touched.
methods.ScaleHumanoid: Called when the Scale humanoid button is touched.
methods.ScaleMeters: Called when the scale meters button is touched.
methods.ScaleMillimeters: Called when the scale millimeters button is touched.
methods.ScaleCentimeters: Called when the scale centimeters button is touched.
methods.ScaleInches: Called when the scale inches button is touched.
methods.OpenCustom: Called when the custom import settings button is touched.
methods.MenuCustom: Called when the custom import settings menu needs generating.
methods.MulScale: Called when the multiply scale by 10X button is touched.
methods.DivScale: Called when the div scale by 10X button is touched.
methods.RunImport: Called when the run import button is touched.
methods.Import_RegularVerticalSplat: Called when the import regular vertical splat button is touched.
methods.Import_FlipVerticalSplat: Called when the import flipped vertical splat button is touched.
methods.Import_SplatLossless: Called when the import splat lossless button is touched.
methods.Import_SplatSPZ: Called when the import splat SPZ button is touched.
methods.AsRawFile: Called when the import as raw file button is touched.
methods.Return: Called when the return to previous button is touched.

notes.title: MaterialType
notes.text: Called when the button is touched.
